caption: The video captures a formal event at the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop and podium branding. On stage, two men are engaged in a discussion. One man is standing near a podium on the left side of the stage, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, while the other man is seated in a chair on the right, holding some papers and occasionally touching his face, possibly in thought or contemplation. The audience, seated in rows, appears attentive, with some individuals using laptops and smartphones, likely taking notes or recording the event. The setting suggests an intellectual or diplomatic discourse, possibly involving policy discussions or expert analysis.
